title: Real Applications for Digital Swiss Francs
intro: Frankencoin is already being used by businesses and individuals across Switzerland for everyday payments, financial operations, and decentralized finance. Explore how ZCHF bridges traditional Swiss francs with the digital economy.

cases.title: Retail Payments
cases.description: Pay directly with Frankencoin at Spar stores across Switzerland
cases.longDescription: Pay with Frankencoin at over 100 Spar stores across Switzerland. Transaction fees are two-thirds lower than Twint or card payments, making it one of the most cost-effective payment methods available to Swiss retailers and consumers.

cases.title: Banking Integration
cases.description: Link Frankencoin to a personal IBAN — connect traditional bank transfers with digital payments
cases.longDescription: Link ZCHF to a personal IBAN through Mt Pelerin, a FINMA-regulated Swiss financial intermediary. Send and receive Swiss franc bank transfers directly from your Frankencoin wallet. Buy ZCHF with bank transfer at 0% fees or pay QR bills using your digital Swiss francs.

cases.title: Earn Interest on Savings
cases.description: Deposit ZCHF into the protocol's savings vault and earn market-based yield on your Swiss franc holdings
cases.longDescription: Deposit ZCHF into the protocol's savings module and earn a market-based yield on Swiss franc holdings. Yield opportunities also exist through DeFi protocols like Morpho (lending) and Curve (liquidity provision).

cases.title: Payroll & HR Administration
cases.description: Complete employee administration including payroll, social security, and pension processing — fully settled in ZCHF
cases.longDescription: Quitt provides complete employee administration including payroll, social security, and pension processing — fully settled in ZCHF. Employers can pay wages in digital Swiss francs with full regulatory compliance, covering all mandatory Swiss social insurance contributions.

cases.title: Treasury Management
cases.description: Professional treasury solutions including rental deposit management in ZCHF
cases.longDescription: Plusplus offers professional treasury solutions for businesses, including rental deposit management settled in ZCHF. Companies can hold and manage Swiss franc liquidity on-chain with full transparency and programmability.

cases.title: Digital Securities
cases.description: Trade tokenized shares and participate in capital raises using ZCHF as the settlement currency
cases.longDescription: Trade tokenized shares on Aktionariat's platform using ZCHF as the settlement currency. Participate in capital raises and secondary trading of Swiss company equity, all settled in digital Swiss francs.

cases.title: Card Payments
cases.description: Use Frankencoin for everyday card payments — transactions settled in ZCHF
cases.longDescription: Spend ZCHF globally using a GnosisPay Visa debit card. The card converts ZCHF for merchant payments at the point of sale while keeping your balance in Swiss francs until you spend it.

cases.title: Crypto Wallet & Card Payments
cases.description: Digital wallet for spending ZCHF globally with Gnosis Pay card — earn yield and cashback on everyday purchases
cases.longDescription: Zeal provides a digital wallet that connects your ZCHF balance to a Visa debit card. Spend anywhere Visa is accepted, earn cashback on everyday purchases, and manage your Swiss franc stablecoin holdings from a single app.

cases.title: DeFi Liquidity
cases.description: Trade ZCHF with low slippage through Curve's automated market maker protocol
cases.longDescription: Provide liquidity or trade ZCHF pairs on Curve Finance with low slippage. Curve is the primary venue for ZCHF liquidity in DeFi, offering efficient stablecoin swaps between ZCHF and other assets.

cases.title: Decentralized Lending
cases.description: Lend and borrow ZCHF through customizable, overcollateralized lending markets on Ethereum and Base
cases.longDescription: Lend and borrow ZCHF through Morpho's customizable lending markets on Ethereum and Base. Earn yield by supplying ZCHF or borrow against your crypto assets with competitive, market-driven rates.

cases.title: Crypto Custody
cases.description: Custody ZCHF through Switzerland's pioneering crypto financial services provider
cases.longDescription: Custody ZCHF through Bitcoin Suisse, Switzerland's pioneering crypto financial services provider, with institutional-grade security and full regulatory compliance.

cases.title: Institutional Custody & Collateral Management
cases.description: ZCHF supported by Copper's institutional custody and collateral management infrastructure
cases.longDescription: Copper's institutional custody enables secure holding and DeFi-ready deployment of Swiss franc liquidity. Institutions can manage ZCHF as part of their broader digital asset portfolio with enterprise-grade infrastructure.

cases.title: Decentralized Index Funds
cases.description: ZCHF as a core component of the ixEDEL DTF — a risk-parity on-chain fund on Reserve Protocol
cases.longDescription: ZCHF is a core component of the ixEDEL DTF on Reserve Protocol — a risk-parity on-chain fund combining gold, Bitcoin, ZCHF, and yield-bearing stablecoins to preserve purchasing power across all economic regimes.
